concerns.text: FR-007 (Edge Case Handling) requires logging exclusion counts/rates to `data/processed/exclusion_log.json`. Task T012d is marked as unchecked `[ ]` and the Analyze report confirms the logic/file is missing. Without this, the system cannot satisfy the mandatory edge case handling defined in FR-007.

FR-002 (Iterative Refinement) and FR-003 (Correlation) require the system to execute loops and record trajectories. Task T013a (Loop Runner) and T013d (Result Logger) are marked as unchecked `[ ]`. The Analyze report confirms these are rejected/missing, leaving the core data generation for US-001 incomplete.

FR-004 (Router Implementation) and FR-006 (Router Evaluation) require a logistic regression model and statistical testing. Tasks T019, T020, T021a, T021b, and T022 are all marked as unchecked `[ ]`. The Analyze report confirms these are missing, meaning US-002 (Dynamic Router Simulation) is not implementable.

FR-005 (Multiple-Comparison Correction) and SC-003 (Robustness) require Holm-Bonferroni correction and sensitivity analysis. Tasks T025a, T025b, T026, and T027 are marked as unchecked `[ ]`. The Analyze report confirms these are missing, leaving US-003 unimplemented.

Plan.md 'Project Structure' mandates `data/`, `code/`, `paper/`, `state/`, `contracts/` directories. Task T001 (Initialize project directory structure) is marked as unchecked `[ ]`. Without this, the foundational file structure required by the Plan is not established.

Plan.md 'Testing' and 'Dependencies' sections rely on code quality tools. Tasks T003 (Configure code formatting: `.ruff.toml`, `pyproject.toml`) are marked as unchecked `[ ]`. The Analyze report notes these artifacts are missing, violating the plan's testing infrastructure requirements.

Plan.md 'Model Pivot' constraint and Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) require documentation of the rationale for substituting LoopCoder-v2 with CodeLlama. Task T008b/c (referenced in Analyze report as missing `paper/model_substitution_rationale.md`) is not explicitly listed as a task in the provided `tasks.md` (only T008 for env config exists). A task to create this mandatory documentation is missing.

SC-005 (Computational Feasibility) requires reporting runtime and resource usage. Task T005e (Implement resource monitoring utility `capture_metrics()`) is marked as unchecked `[ ]`. The Analyze report confirms this is missing, leaving the project unable to measure SC-005.
